member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.BackgroundComputation`1.Poll(System.Int32,`0@,System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Processes a completed task (if any) and reports the current state for the given input hash. Returns true when a fresh result was adopted this call. When is true the caller must invoke with work matching . Rethrows a pending fault for the current inputs.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.BackgroundComputation`1.Start(System.Int32,System.Func{`0})
member.summary: Starts the background work for the given input hash.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Extruder.DefaultFlatteningTolerance
member.summary: Default outline flattening tolerance (as the original implementation).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Extruder.DefaultSmoothingAngle
member.summary: Default smoothing angle in cycles (vvvv standard unit; 1/6 = 60°); its cosine matches the original hard-coded 0.5 threshold.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Extruder.DefaultTextureScale
member.summary: Default surface distance covered by one texture repeat (ContourDepthTiled only).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.ExtrudingSink.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{Stride.Graphics.VertexPositionNormalTexture},System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,Stride.Core.Mathematics.Vector2,Stride.Core.Mathematics.Vector2,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.SideUVMapping,System.Single)
member.param: Z of the front face (was +height/2 in the original).
Z of the back face (was -height/2 in the original).
Adjacent edge normals are averaged when their dot product exceeds this (cos of the smoothing angle; the original hard-coded 0.5).
How the side walls are UV-mapped; ContourDepthTiled also switches the caps to absolute density.
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat (ContourDepthTiled only).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.GlyphOutlineCollector
member.summary: Collects one outline geometry per glyph (local coordinates) plus its baseline pen position.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.GlyphMeshBuilder.ExtractGlyphVertices(Silk.NET.DirectWrite.IDWriteTextLayout*,System.Single,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ExtrudeOrigin,System.Single,System.Single,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.SideUVMapping,System.Single)
member.summary: Extracts one extruded vertex array per visible glyph (local coordinates, pivot on the baseline at the glyph's pen position) plus the world-space baseline position. Glyphs without ink (spaces) are skipped.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.PrebuiltMeshModel
member.summary: Procedural model over an already-computed vertex array (used to turn per-glyph vertices into Stride meshes).

member.name: P:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.PrebuiltMeshModel.WeldVertices
member.summary: Welds identical vertices into an indexed mesh (visually lossless, smaller buffers; changes the mesh topology).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.MeshWelder.Weld(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Stride.Graphics.VertexPositionNormalTexture})
member.summary: Deduplicates identical vertices, producing a compact vertex array plus a real index buffer.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.OutlineRenderer.GetGeometry
member.summary: Accumulated geometry (null for empty text). The caller takes ownership.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.OutlineRenderer.AddTransformedGeometry(Silk.NET.Direct2D.ID2D1PathGeometry*,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Wraps pg in translate(baseline) x scale(1,-1), releases pg, accumulates.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.TextOutlineExtractor
member.summary: The whole-text extraction pipeline (outline union -> extrusion), usable from any thread.

member.name: P:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Text3dBase.ExtrudeOrigin
member.summary: Where the extruded mesh sits relative to Z = 0.

member.name: P:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Text3dBase.FlatteningTolerance
member.summary: Maximum outline flattening deviation; smaller values yield finer curves (and more vertices).

member.name: P:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Text3dBase.SmoothingAngle
member.summary: Side-wall edges sharper than this angle (in cycles, vvvv standard unit) stay hard; flatter ones are smoothed.

member.name: P:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Text3dBase.WeldVertices
member.summary: Welds identical vertices into an indexed mesh (visually lossless, smaller buffers; changes the mesh topology).

member.name: P:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Text3dBase.SideUVMapping
member.summary: How the side walls of the extrusion are UV-mapped.

member.name: P:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Text3dBase.TextureScale
member.summary: Surface distance covered by one texture repeat (ContourDepthTiled only).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Text3dBase.ExtractVertices(Silk.NET.DirectWrite.IDWriteTextLayout*)
member.summary: Draws the layout into an OutlineRenderer and extrudes the result into vertexList.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Text3dModel
member.summary: Generates an extruded 3D text mesh from simple text/font/alignment settings.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Text3dAdvancedModel
member.summary: Generates an extruded 3D text mesh from an externally built text layout.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.TextFormatHandle
member.summary: Owns a native IDWriteTextFormat reference.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.TextFormatHandle.FromPointer(System.IntPtr,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wraps a native pointer. When addRef is false the handle takes over the caller's reference.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.TextLayoutHandle
member.summary: Owns a native IDWriteTextLayout reference.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.TextLayoutHandle.FromPointer(System.IntPtr,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Wraps a native pointer. When addRef is false the handle takes over the caller's reference.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.TextLayoutHandle.QueryInterface(System.Guid@)
member.summary: QIs to a versioned layout interface (e.g. IDWriteTextLayout1/2). Caller must Marshal.Release the result.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.ITextStyle
member.summary: A styling operation applied to a text range of a layout (see the TextStyles category).

member.name: P:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.ITextStyle.Version
member.summary: Increments whenever any setting of the style changes.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.ITextStyle.Apply(VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.TextLayoutHandle)
member.summary: Applies the style to the given layout (no-op when disabled).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.TextStyleBase.BumpVersion
member.summary: Marks the style changed; called by the owning style node when a value changes.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TextAlignment
member.summary: Alignment of paragraph text along the reading direction axis (DWRITE_TEXT_ALIGNMENT).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TextAlignment.Leading
member.summary: Text is aligned to the leading edge of the layout box (left for left-to-right text).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TextAlignment.Trailing
member.summary: Text is aligned to the trailing edge of the layout box (right for left-to-right text).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TextAlignment.Center
member.summary: Text is centered within the layout box.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TextAlignment.Justified
member.summary: Text is spread to fill the width of the layout box.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ParagraphAlignment
member.summary: Alignment option of a paragraph relative to the layout box's top and bottom edge (DWRITE_PARAGRAPH_ALIGNMENT).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ParagraphAlignment.Near
member.summary: The first line is aligned to the flow's beginning edge (top for top-to-bottom flow).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ParagraphAlignment.Far
member.summary: The last line is aligned to the flow's ending edge (bottom for top-to-bottom flow).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ParagraphAlignment.Center
member.summary: Lines are centered between the flow's beginning and ending edge.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.WordWrapping
member.summary: Word wrapping in multiline paragraphs (DWRITE_WORD_WRAPPING).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.WordWrapping.Wrap
member.summary: Words are broken across lines to keep text within the layout box.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.WordWrapping.NoWrap
member.summary: Words may overflow the layout box; text only breaks at explicit line breaks.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.WordWrapping.EmergencyBreak
member.summary: Like Wrap, but a word wider than the layout box is broken mid-word.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.WordWrapping.WholeWord
member.summary: Only whole words wrap; a too-wide word overflows instead of breaking.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.WordWrapping.Character
member.summary: Text may wrap after any character.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch
member.summary: Font stretch as a percentage of normal width (DWRITE_FONT_STRETCH).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.Undefined
member.summary: No stretch information is available.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.UltraCondensed
member.summary: 50% of normal width.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.ExtraCondensed
member.summary: 62.5% of normal width.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.Condensed
member.summary: 75% of normal width.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.SemiCondensed
member.summary: 87.5% of normal width.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.Normal
member.summary: Normal width (100%).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.Medium
member.summary: Normal width (100%); alias of Normal.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.SemiExpanded
member.summary: 112.5% of normal width.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.Expanded
member.summary: 125% of normal width.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.ExtraExpanded
member.summary: 150% of normal width.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch.UltraExpanded
member.summary: 200% of normal width.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStyle
member.summary: Font slope style: normal, italic or oblique (DWRITE_FONT_STYLE).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStyle.Normal
member.summary: Upright glyphs.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStyle.Oblique
member.summary: Upright glyphs artificially slanted.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStyle.Italic
member.summary: The font's true italic glyph forms.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight
member.summary: Font weight from thin to black (DWRITE_FONT_WEIGHT).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.Thin
member.summary: Thin (100).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.ExtraLight
member.summary: Extra light (200).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.UltraLight
member.summary: Ultra light (200); alias of ExtraLight.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.Light
member.summary: Light (300).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.SemiLight
member.summary: Semi light (350).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.Normal
member.summary: Normal (400).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.Regular
member.summary: Regular (400); alias of Normal.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.Medium
member.summary: Medium (500).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.DemiBold
member.summary: Demi bold (600).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.SemiBold
member.summary: Semi bold (600); alias of DemiBold.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.Bold
member.summary: Bold (700).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.ExtraBold
member.summary: Extra bold (800).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.UltraBold
member.summary: Ultra bold (800); alias of ExtraBold.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.Black
member.summary: Black (900).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.Heavy
member.summary: Heavy (900); alias of Black.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.ExtraBlack
member.summary: Extra black (950).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight.UltraBlack
member.summary: Ultra black (950); alias of ExtraBlack.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.LineSpacingMethod
member.summary: Method used for line spacing in a text layout (DWRITE_LINE_SPACING_METHOD).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.LineSpacingMethod.Default
member.summary: Line spacing depends solely on the content.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.LineSpacingMethod.Uniform
member.summary: Uniform line spacing regardless of content; Line Spacing and Baseline are used.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.LineSpacingMethod.Proportional
member.summary: Line spacing and baseline distance proportional to the content's computed values.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ReadingDirection
member.summary: Direction for how reading progresses (DWRITE_READING_DIRECTION).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ReadingDirection.LeftToRight
member.summary: Reading progresses left to right.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ReadingDirection.RightToLeft
member.summary: Reading progresses right to left.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ReadingDirection.TopToBottom
member.summary: Reading progresses top to bottom.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ReadingDirection.BottomToTop
member.summary: Reading progresses bottom to top.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FlowDirection
member.summary: Direction for how lines of text are placed relative to one another (DWRITE_FLOW_DIRECTION).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FlowDirection.TopToBottom
member.summary: Lines flow top to bottom.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FlowDirection.BottomToTop
member.summary: Lines flow bottom to top.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FlowDirection.LeftToRight
member.summary: Lines flow left to right.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FlowDirection.RightToLeft
member.summary: Lines flow right to left.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TrimmingGranularity
member.summary: Text granularity used to trim text overflowing the layout box (DWRITE_TRIMMING_GRANULARITY).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TrimmingGranularity.None
member.summary: No trimming; text overflows the layout box.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TrimmingGranularity.Character
member.summary: Text is trimmed at a character boundary.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TrimmingGranularity.Word
member.summary: Text is trimmed at a word boundary.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.OpticalAlignment
member.summary: How to align glyphs to the margin (DWRITE_OPTICAL_ALIGNMENT).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.OpticalAlignment.None
member.summary: Default alignment respecting the glyphs' side bearings.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.OpticalAlignment.NoSideBearings
member.summary: Glyph edges align optically to the margins, ignoring side bearings.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.VerticalGlyphOrientation
member.summary: Orientation of glyphs when a vertical reading direction is used (DWRITE_VERTICAL_GLYPH_ORIENTATION).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.VerticalGlyphOrientation.Default
member.summary: Latin script rotates 90° clockwise in vertical flow; ideographs stay upright.

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.VerticalGlyphOrientation.Stacked
member.summary: All glyphs stay upright (stacked) in vertical flow.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.SideUVMapping
member.summary: How the side walls of the extrusion are UV-mapped (library-specific, since 2.2).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.SideUVMapping.Silhouette
member.summary: Side walls reuse the caps' planar silhouette projection; constant along the depth (the original behavior).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.SideUVMapping.ContourDepth
member.summary: U runs once around each contour (0 to 1, wrap seam where the contour closes), V runs along the depth (0 front, 1 back).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.SideUVMapping.ContourDepthTiled
member.summary: U and V carry absolute surface distances divided by Texture Scale, on walls and caps alike; uniform texel density, use wrapping texture addressing.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ExtrudeOrigin
member.summary: Where the extruded mesh sits relative to Z = 0 (library-specific, since 2.2).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ExtrudeOrigin.Center
member.summary: The extrusion is centered on Z = 0 (from +amount/2 to -amount/2).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ExtrudeOrigin.Front
member.summary: The front face sits at Z = 0; the mesh extends backwards (negative Z).

member.name: F:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ExtrudeOrigin.Back
member.summary: The back face sits at Z = 0; the mesh extends forwards (positive Z).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontFeatureTag
member.summary: Typographic feature of text supplied by the font (used by the Typography text style).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Interop.Point2F
member.summary: D2D1_POINT_2F, the 8-byte by-value point used by BeginFigure.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Interop.ComCallbackHelper
member.summary: Bridges managed callback objects to native COM interface pointers.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Interop.ComCallbackHelper.GetComPointer(System.Object,System.Guid@)
member.summary: Returns a native COM interface pointer (AddRef'd) for the given managed object and interface IID. Caller must release it via .

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Interop.Native.CreateTextFormat(System.String,System.Single,Silk.NET.DirectWrite.FontWeight,Silk.NET.DirectWrite.FontStyle,Silk.NET.DirectWrite.FontStretch)
member.summary: Creates a TextFormat with SharpDX-convenience-constructor semantics (system font collection, locale ""). Family name and locale are passed as pinned UTF-16 pointers; do NOT use the Silk.NET managed-string overloads here: they marshal DWrite's WCHAR parameters with the wrong encoding (observed in the Phase 1 spike: garbage family name causing silent font fallback plus intermittent E_INVALIDARG).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Interop.Native.CreateTextLayout(System.String,Silk.NET.DirectWrite.IDWriteTextFormat*,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a TextLayout over the given format (pinned UTF-16 text).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph
member.summary: Builds a DirectWrite text layout from font, paragraph and text settings. Feed it into Text3d (Advanced), Text3dMesh (Advanced), TextLayoutMetrics or LineMetrics.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetBasicFontProperties(VL.Lib.Text.FontList,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStyle,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets font family, weight, style, stretch and size.
member.param: The name of the font family.
The weight (thickness of the strokes) of the font.
The style (normal, italic or oblique) of the font.
The stretch (width relative to normal) of the font.
The logical size of the font in DIP units (1 DIP = 1/96 inch).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetTextAlignment(VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TextAlignment)
member.summary: Sets the alignment of text along the reading direction axis.
member.param: The alignment of paragraph text relative to the leading and trailing edge of the layout box.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetParagraphAlignment(VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ParagraphAlignment)
member.summary: Sets the alignment of the paragraph relative to the layout box.
member.param: The alignment of the paragraph relative to the top and bottom edge of the layout box.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetWordWrapping(VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.WordWrapping,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets word wrapping (and whether the last line wraps).
member.param: The word wrapping option applied to the whole layout.
Whether the last word on the last line is wrapped.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetLineSpacing(VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.LineSpacingMethod,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Sets line spacing method, line height and baseline distance.
member.param: How line height is determined (from content, uniform, or proportional).
The line height, the distance from one baseline to the next (used by the Uniform method).
The distance from the top of the line to its baseline; a reasonable ratio is 80% of the line spacing.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetReadingDirection(VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ReadingDirection)
member.summary: Sets the direction reading progresses in.
member.param: The text reading direction (for example right-to-left) set for the paragraph.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetFlowDirection(VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FlowDirection)
member.summary: Sets the direction lines are placed in.
member.param: The direction in which lines of text are placed relative to one another.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetText(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the text of the layout.
member.param: The string the text layout is created from.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetMaxWidth(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the layout box width (0 = unconstrained).
member.param: The maximum width of the layout box, in DIP units; alignment, wrapping and trimming are computed against it.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetMaxHeight(System.Single)
member.summary: Sets the layout box height.
member.param: The maximum height of the layout box, in DIP units; paragraph alignment is computed against it.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetTrimming(VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TrimmingGranularity,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets trimming for text overflowing the layout box.
member.param: The text granularity (character or word) at which trimming applies.
A character that signals the beginning of the portion of text to preserve; most useful for path ellipsis, where the delimiter would be a slash. Empty for none.
How many occurrences of the delimiter to step back from the end.
Whether an ellipsis (…) sign is shown at the trimming position.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetOpticalAlignment(VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.OpticalAlignment)
member.summary: Sets how glyphs align to the margins.
member.param: How glyphs align to the margins: default, or ignoring the glyphs' side bearings so their edges align optically.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.SetVerticalGlyphOrientation(VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.VerticalGlyphOrientation)
member.summary: Sets the orientation of glyphs when a vertical reading direction is used.
member.param: The preferred orientation of glyphs in a vertical reading direction: rotated per script defaults, or all upright (stacked).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.ApplyStyles(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.ITextStyle})
member.summary: Applies per-range text styles (see the TextStyles category).
member.param: The text styles applied to the layout, in order; later styles override earlier ones on overlapping ranges.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.GetIsDirty
member.summary: True when the next GetTextLayout/GetTextFormat call will rebuild the layout.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.GetVersion
member.summary: Increments whenever the layout is rebuilt (change signal for consumers).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.GetTextLayout
member.summary: The built text layout.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph.GetTextFormat
member.summary: The built text format.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.Text3dMeshAsync
member.summary: Like Text3dMesh, but generates the mesh on a background thread; the last completed mesh is output while a new one is computed.

member.param: The generated text mesh (the last completed one while a computation is in progress).
True while a mesh is being computed in the background.
The string to render.
The name of the font family.
The logical size of the font in DIP units (1 DIP = 1/96 inch).
The alignment of paragraph text relative to the leading and trailing edge of the layout box.
The alignment of the paragraph relative to the top and bottom edge of the layout box.
The depth of the extrusion along Z.
Where the extruded mesh sits relative to Z = 0.
The maximum deviation allowed when flattening the outlines; smaller values yield finer curves and more vertices.
In cycles: side-wall edges sharper than this angle stay hard, flatter ones are shaded smooth.

How the side walls are UV-mapped: Silhouette keeps the caps' planar projection (constant along the depth), ContourDepth runs U once around each contour and V along the depth, ContourDepthTiled tiles absolute surface distances by Texture Scale on walls and caps (use wrapping texture addressing).
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat; only used by ContourDepthTiled.
Welds identical vertices into an indexed mesh: visually lossless with smaller buffers, but changes the mesh topology (off keeps the plain triangle list).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.Text3dMeshAdvancedAsync
member.summary: Like Text3dMesh (Advanced), but generates the mesh on a background thread; the last completed mesh is output while a new one is computed.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.Text3dMeshAdvancedAsync.Update(Stride.Rendering.Mesh@,System.Boolean@,VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph,System.Single,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ExtrudeOrigin,System.Single,System.Single,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.SideUVMapping,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.param: The generated text mesh (the last completed one while a computation is in progress).
True while a mesh is being computed in the background.
The FontAndParagraph providing the text layout to render.
The depth of the extrusion along Z.
Where the extruded mesh sits relative to Z = 0.
The maximum deviation allowed when flattening the outlines; smaller values yield finer curves and more vertices.
In cycles: side-wall edges sharper than this angle stay hard, flatter ones are shaded smooth.

How the side walls are UV-mapped: Silhouette keeps the caps' planar projection (constant along the depth), ContourDepth runs U once around each contour and V along the depth, ContourDepthTiled tiles absolute surface distances by Texture Scale on walls and caps (use wrapping texture addressing).
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat; only used by ContourDepthTiled.
Welds identical vertices into an indexed mesh: visually lossless with smaller buffers, but changes the mesh topology (off keeps the plain triangle list).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.Text3dMeshesAsync
member.summary: Like Text3dMeshes, but generates the per-glyph meshes on a background thread; the last completed set is output while a new one is computed.

member.param: One mesh per visible glyph, in draw order (the last completed set while a computation is in progress).
Per glyph: the translation placing the mesh at its position in the text.
True while the meshes are being computed in the background.
The string to render.
The name of the font family.
The logical size of the font in DIP units (1 DIP = 1/96 inch).
The alignment of paragraph text relative to the leading and trailing edge of the layout box.
The alignment of the paragraph relative to the top and bottom edge of the layout box.
The depth of the extrusion along Z.
Where the extruded meshes sit relative to Z = 0.
The maximum deviation allowed when flattening the outlines; smaller values yield finer curves and more vertices.
In cycles: side-wall edges sharper than this angle stay hard, flatter ones are shaded smooth.

How the side walls are UV-mapped: Silhouette keeps the caps' planar projection (constant along the depth), ContourDepth runs U once around each contour and V along the depth, ContourDepthTiled tiles absolute surface distances by Texture Scale on walls and caps (use wrapping texture addressing).
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat; only used by ContourDepthTiled.
Welds identical vertices into indexed meshes: visually lossless with smaller buffers, but changes the mesh topology (off keeps the plain triangle lists).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.Text3dMeshesAdvancedAsync
member.summary: Like Text3dMeshes (Advanced), but generates the per-glyph meshes on a background thread; the last completed set is output while a new one is computed.

member.param: One mesh per visible glyph, in draw order (the last completed set while a computation is in progress).
Per glyph: the translation placing the mesh at its position in the text.
True while the meshes are being computed in the background.
The FontAndParagraph providing the text layout to render.
The depth of the extrusion along Z.
Where the extruded meshes sit relative to Z = 0.
The maximum deviation allowed when flattening the outlines; smaller values yield finer curves and more vertices.
In cycles: side-wall edges sharper than this angle stay hard, flatter ones are shaded smooth.

How the side walls are UV-mapped: Silhouette keeps the caps' planar projection (constant along the depth), ContourDepth runs U once around each contour and V along the depth, ContourDepthTiled tiles absolute surface distances by Texture Scale on walls and caps (use wrapping texture addressing).
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat; only used by ContourDepthTiled.
Welds identical vertices into indexed meshes: visually lossless with smaller buffers, but changes the mesh topology (off keeps the plain triangle lists).

member.summary: Builds one Stride mesh per visible glyph plus its translation matrix.
Turns precomputed per-glyph vertices into GPU meshes (main thread).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.GlyphMeshNodeHelper.BuildMesh(Stride.Engine.Game,VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.PrebuiltMeshModel,Stride.Graphics.VertexPositionNormalTexture[])
member.summary: Builds a whole-text mesh from precomputed vertices (main thread).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.GlyphMeshNodeHelper.CreateSimpleLayout(System.String,System.String,System.Single,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.TextAlignment,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ParagraphAlignment)
member.summary: Creates a layout with the same settings the simple Text3d nodes use.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.Text3dMesh
member.summary: Renders a string of text as an extruded 3D mesh.

member.param: The generated text mesh.
The string to render.
The name of the font family.
The logical size of the font in DIP units (1 DIP = 1/96 inch).
The alignment of paragraph text relative to the leading and trailing edge of the layout box.
The alignment of the paragraph relative to the top and bottom edge of the layout box.
The depth of the extrusion along Z.
Where the extruded mesh sits relative to Z = 0.
The maximum deviation allowed when flattening the outlines; smaller values yield finer curves and more vertices.
In cycles: side-wall edges sharper than this angle stay hard, flatter ones are shaded smooth.

How the side walls are UV-mapped: Silhouette keeps the caps' planar projection (constant along the depth), ContourDepth runs U once around each contour and V along the depth, ContourDepthTiled tiles absolute surface distances by Texture Scale on walls and caps (use wrapping texture addressing).
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat; only used by ContourDepthTiled.
Welds identical vertices into an indexed mesh: visually lossless with smaller buffers, but changes the mesh topology (off keeps the plain triangle list).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.Text3dMeshes
member.summary: Renders a string of text as one extruded 3D mesh per glyph, with per-glyph transforms for typography animation. The pivot of each mesh is on the baseline at the glyph's pen position. Spaces produce no mesh; ligatures may merge characters; underline and strikethrough are not included.

member.param: One mesh per visible glyph, in draw order, each in local coordinates around its baseline pivot.
Per glyph: the translation placing the mesh at its position in the text.
The string to render.
The name of the font family.
The logical size of the font in DIP units (1 DIP = 1/96 inch).
The alignment of paragraph text relative to the leading and trailing edge of the layout box.
The alignment of the paragraph relative to the top and bottom edge of the layout box.
The depth of the extrusion along Z.
Where the extruded meshes sit relative to Z = 0.
The maximum deviation allowed when flattening the outlines; smaller values yield finer curves and more vertices.
In cycles: side-wall edges sharper than this angle stay hard, flatter ones are shaded smooth.

How the side walls are UV-mapped: Silhouette keeps the caps' planar projection (constant along the depth), ContourDepth runs U once around each contour and V along the depth, ContourDepthTiled tiles absolute surface distances by Texture Scale on walls and caps (use wrapping texture addressing).
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat; only used by ContourDepthTiled.
Welds identical vertices into indexed meshes: visually lossless with smaller buffers, but changes the mesh topology (off keeps the plain triangle lists).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.Text3dMeshesAdvanced
member.summary: Renders a FontAndParagraph text layout as one extruded 3D mesh per glyph, with per-glyph transforms for typography animation. The pivot of each mesh is on the baseline at the glyph's pen position. Spaces produce no mesh; ligatures may merge characters; underline and strikethrough are not included.

member.param: One mesh per visible glyph, in draw order, each in local coordinates around its baseline pivot.
Per glyph: the translation placing the mesh at its position in the text.
The FontAndParagraph providing the text layout to render.
The depth of the extrusion along Z.
Where the extruded meshes sit relative to Z = 0.
The maximum deviation allowed when flattening the outlines; smaller values yield finer curves and more vertices.
In cycles: side-wall edges sharper than this angle stay hard, flatter ones are shaded smooth.

How the side walls are UV-mapped: Silhouette keeps the caps' planar projection (constant along the depth), ContourDepth runs U once around each contour and V along the depth, ContourDepthTiled tiles absolute surface distances by Texture Scale on walls and caps (use wrapping texture addressing).
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat; only used by ContourDepthTiled.
Welds identical vertices into indexed meshes: visually lossless with smaller buffers, but changes the mesh topology (off keeps the plain triangle lists).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.Text3dMeshAdvanced
member.summary: Renders a FontAndParagraph text layout as an extruded 3D mesh.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Meshes.Text3dMeshAdvanced.Update(Stride.Rendering.Mesh@,VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph,System.Single,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.ExtrudeOrigin,System.Single,System.Single,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.SideUVMapping,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.param: The generated text mesh.
The FontAndParagraph providing the text layout to render.
The depth of the extrusion along Z.
Where the extruded mesh sits relative to Z = 0.
The maximum deviation allowed when flattening the outlines; smaller values yield finer curves and more vertices.
In cycles: side-wall edges sharper than this angle stay hard, flatter ones are shaded smooth.

How the side walls are UV-mapped: Silhouette keeps the caps' planar projection (constant along the depth), ContourDepth runs U once around each contour and V along the depth, ContourDepthTiled tiles absolute surface distances by Texture Scale on walls and caps (use wrapping texture addressing).
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat; only used by ContourDepthTiled.
Welds identical vertices into an indexed mesh: visually lossless with smaller buffers, but changes the mesh topology (off keeps the plain triangle list).

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.TextLayoutMetrics
member.summary: Reads the overall metrics of a FontAndParagraph's text layout.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.TextLayoutMetrics.Update(System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Single@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@,VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.FontAndParagraph,System.Boolean)
member.param: The left-most point of formatted text relative to the layout box, excluding any glyph overhang.
The top-most point of formatted text relative to the layout box, excluding any glyph overhang.
The width of the formatted text, ignoring trailing whitespace at the end of each line.
The height of the formatted text; for an empty string this is the height of the default font.
The height of the formatted text, taking trailing whitespace into account.
The width of the formatted text, taking the trailing whitespace at the end of each line into account.
The initial width given to the layout (Max Width).
The initial height given to the layout (Max Height).
Total number of lines.
The maximum bidirectional reordering count of any line of text; 1 if there is no bidirectional text or no text at all.
The FontAndParagraph whose text layout is measured.
Re-reads the metrics even when the layout did not change.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.LineMetrics
member.summary: Reads the per-line metrics of a FontAndParagraph's text layout.

member.param: Per line: the distance from the top of the text line to its baseline.
Per line: the height of the text line.
Per line: whether the line is trimmed.
Per line: the number of text positions, including trailing whitespace and newline characters.
Per line: the number of characters in the newline sequence at its end; 0 if the line was wrapped or is the end of the text.
Per line: the number of whitespace positions at its end (newline sequences count as whitespace).
The FontAndParagraph whose text layout is measured.
Re-reads the metrics even when the layout did not change.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Models.Text3dModelBuilder.Build(VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.Text3dBase,Stride.Engine.Game)
member.summary: Generates a Stride Model from the procedural text model.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Models.Text3dModelBuilder.ApplyTransformation(Stride.Engine.Entity,System.Nullable{Stride.Core.Mathematics.Matrix})
member.summary: Applies the optional Transformation matrix to the entity's transform.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Models.Text3dModelBuilder.SyncComponents(Stride.Engine.Entity,Stride.Engine.ModelComponent,VL.Lib.Collections.Spread{Stride.Engine.EntityComponent}@,VL.Lib.Collections.Spread{Stride.Engine.EntityComponent})
member.summary: Syncs user-provided extra components onto the entity (never touches ownComponent).

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Models.Text3dModelBuilder.SyncChildren(Stride.Engine.Entity,VL.Lib.Collections.Spread{Stride.Engine.Entity}@,VL.Lib.Collections.Spread{Stride.Engine.Entity})
member.summary: Syncs user-provided child entities under the entity's transform.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Models.Text3d
member.summary: Renders a string of text as an extruded 3D model entity.

member.param: The entity holding the generated text model.
The string to render.
The name of the font family.
The logical size of the font in DIP units (1 DIP = 1/96 inch).
The alignment of paragraph text relative to the leading and trailing edge of the layout box.
The alignment of the paragraph relative to the top and bottom edge of the layout box.
The depth of the extrusion along Z.
Where the extruded mesh sits relative to Z = 0.
The maximum deviation allowed when flattening the outlines; smaller values yield finer curves and more vertices.
In cycles: side-wall edges sharper than this angle stay hard, flatter ones are shaded smooth.

How the side walls are UV-mapped: Silhouette keeps the caps' planar projection (constant along the depth), ContourDepth runs U once around each contour and V along the depth, ContourDepthTiled tiles absolute surface distances by Texture Scale on walls and caps (use wrapping texture addressing).
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat; only used by ContourDepthTiled.
Welds identical vertices into an indexed mesh: visually lossless with smaller buffers, but changes the mesh topology (off keeps the plain triangle list).
The transformation applied to the entity; when not set the entity keeps its default transform.
The material used to render the model.
Whether the model casts shadows.
Additional components attached to the entity.
Entities parented under this entity's transform.
The name of the entity.
Whether the model is rendered.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.Nodes.Models.Text3dAdvanced
member.summary: Renders a FontAndParagraph text layout as an extruded 3D model entity.

member.param: The entity holding the generated text model.
The FontAndParagraph providing the text layout to render.
The depth of the extrusion along Z.
Where the extruded mesh sits relative to Z = 0.
The maximum deviation allowed when flattening the outlines; smaller values yield finer curves and more vertices.
In cycles: side-wall edges sharper than this angle stay hard, flatter ones are shaded smooth.

How the side walls are UV-mapped: Silhouette keeps the caps' planar projection (constant along the depth), ContourDepth runs U once around each contour and V along the depth, ContourDepthTiled tiles absolute surface distances by Texture Scale on walls and caps (use wrapping texture addressing).
Surface distance covered by one texture repeat; only used by ContourDepthTiled.
Welds identical vertices into an indexed mesh: visually lossless with smaller buffers, but changes the mesh topology (off keeps the plain triangle list).
The transformation applied to the entity; when not set the entity keeps its default transform.
The material used to render the model.
Whether the model casts shadows.
Additional components attached to the entity.
Entities parented under this entity's transform.
The name of the entity.
Whether the model is rendered.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.LayoutInterop.GetLayout1(VL.Stride.Text3d.Core.TextLayoutHandle)
member.summary: QIs to IDWriteTextLayout1; caller must Marshal.Release the returned pointer.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.FontFamily
member.summary: Sets the font family for a text range.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.FontFamily.Update(System.Int32,System.Int32,VL.Lib.Text.FontList,System.Boolean)
member.param: The start text position of the range the style applies to.
The number of text positions in the range.
The font family name applied to the text range.
Whether the style is applied.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.FontSize
member.summary: Sets the font size for a text range.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.FontSize.Update(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.param: The start text position of the range the style applies to.
The number of text positions in the range.
The font size in DIP units (1 DIP = 1/96 inch) applied to the text range.
Whether the style is applied.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.FontStretch
member.summary: Sets the font stretch for a text range.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.FontStretch.Update(System.Int32,System.Int32,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStretch,System.Boolean)
member.param: The start text position of the range the style applies to.
The number of text positions in the range.
The font stretch (width relative to normal) applied to the text range.
Whether the style is applied.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.FontStyle
member.summary: Sets the font style (normal, italic, oblique) for a text range.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.FontStyle.Update(System.Int32,System.Int32,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontStyle,System.Boolean)
member.param: The start text position of the range the style applies to.
The number of text positions in the range.
The font style (normal, italic or oblique) applied to the text range.
Whether the style is applied.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.FontWeight
member.summary: Sets the font weight for a text range.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.FontWeight.Update(System.Int32,System.Int32,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontWeight,System.Boolean)
member.param: The start text position of the range the style applies to.
The number of text positions in the range.
The font weight (thickness of the strokes) applied to the text range.
Whether the style is applied.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.StrikeThrough
member.summary: Strikes through a text range.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.StrikeThrough.Update(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.param: The start text position of the range the style applies to.
The number of text positions in the range.
Whether strikethrough takes place within the text range.
Whether the style is applied.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.Underline
member.summary: Underlines a text range.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.Underline.Update(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.param: The start text position of the range the style applies to.
The number of text positions in the range.
Whether underline takes place within the text range.
Whether the style is applied.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.PairKerning
member.summary: Enables pair kerning for a text range.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.PairKerning.Update(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.param: The start text position of the range the style applies to.
The number of text positions in the range.
Whether the text in the range is pair-kerned using the font's kerning pair adjustments.
Whether the style is applied.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.CharacterSpacing
member.summary: Sets leading/trailing character spacing and minimum advance width for a text range.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.CharacterSpacing.Update(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.param: The start text position of the range the style applies to.
The number of text positions in the range.
The spacing before each character, in reading order.
The spacing after each character, in reading order.
The minimum advance of each character, preventing characters from becoming too thin or zero-width; must be zero or greater.
Whether the style is applied.

member.name: T:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.Typography
member.summary: Applies an OpenType typography feature to a text range.

member.name: M:VL.Stride.Text3d.TextStyles.Typography.Update(System.Int32,System.Int32,VL.Stride.Text3d.Enums.FontFeatureTag,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.param: The start text position of the range the style applies to.
The number of text positions in the range.
The OpenType feature (by name tag) applied to the text range.
The execution parameter of the feature: non-zero generally enables it, zero disables it; features requiring a selector use this as the selector index.
Whether the style is applied.
